title: agropyron spicatum f. inerme
intro: Agropyron spicatum f. inerme, also known as a variant of the needle-grass or green needle-grass, is a type of grass native to the grasslands of North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Agropyron spicatum f. inerme include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and soothing skin irritations. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures for topical use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
